hero.title: Phendula Ividiyo Eyodwa Ibe
hero.subtitle: Namathisela isixhumanisi noma ulayishe ifayela — i-AI ikopisha ngokuzenzakalelayo futhi isebenzise kabusha okuqukethwe kwakho kube okuthunyelwe kwebhulogi, imicu yomphakathi, izincwadi zezindaba, nokunye.
hero.accent: Khuphula umkhiqizo wakho wokuqukethwe ngokuphindwe ka-10.
hero.placeholder: Namathisela isixhumanisi se-YouTube, i-podcast, noma enye ividiyo...

steps.title: Namathisela noma Layisha
steps.desc: Phonsa isixhumanisi se-YouTube, layisha ifayela lomsindo, noma unamathisele umbhalo. Akukho ukulungiselela okudingekayo — chofoza nje okukodwa.

steps.title: I-AI Yenza Umlingo Wayo
steps.desc: I-AI yethu ikopisha futhi iqonde okuqukethwe kwakho, bese ikubhala kabusha ngokuhlakanipha ukuze kufane nesitayela esiyingqayizivele sendawo ngayinye.

steps.title: Shicilela Yonke Indawo
steps.desc: Thola okuqukethwe okucwengiwe kwe-WeChat, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, amabhulogi, nokunye. Kopisha, landa, noma wabelane ngaso ngokushesha.

features.label: Izici
features.title: Konke Okudingayo Ukuze
features.subtitle: Yakhelwe abadali abafuna ukukhulisa konke okuqukethwe abakukhiqizayo.

list.title: Ukubhala Kabusha Okunamandla nge-AI
list.desc: Hhayi ukukopisha nje — i-AI yethu iyaqonda umongo futhi ibhale kabusha ngokwezwi nezwi lendlela yendawo ngayinye.

list.title: Izindlela Zokukhipha Eziyi-10
list.desc: Okuthunyelwe kwebhulogi, imicu ye-Twitter, okuthunyelwe kwe-LinkedIn, amanothi e-Xiaohongshu, izincwadi zezindaba, izihloko ze-SRT, izihloko ze-SEO, nokunye.

list.title: Izilimi Ezingaphezu Kwama-63
list.desc: Kopisha futhi ukhiqize okuqukethwe ngezilimi ezingaphezu kwama-63. Kulungele abadali bamazwe ngamazwe nezethameli zomhlaba wonke.

list.title: Ukukhiqiza Okusakazwayo
list.desc: Bona okuqukethwe kuvela uhlamvu ngohlamvu ngesikhathi sangempela. Akusekho ukulinda izipinari ezilayishayo.

list.title: Ukucwengwa Okungaxoxwayo
list.desc: Xoxa nokukhipha ngakunye ukuze ukuhlele kahle. Ithi "yenza kube mfushane" noma "engeza i-emoji" — i-AI iyisebenzise ngokushesha.

list.title: Izindlela Zokukhipha Eziyisi-6
list.desc: Landa njenge-Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, noma CSV. Ilungele ukushicilelwa ngqo.

list.title: Yabelana futhi Usebenzisane
list.desc: Khiqiza izixhumanisi ezabelwanayo ozosebenzisana ngazo nothanga bakho.

list.title: Kuyimfihlo futhi Kuvikelekile
list.desc: Okuqukethwe kwakho kuhlala kungokwakho. Amafayela ayasuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kokucubungula. Akukho ukugcinwa kwedatha.

list.title: Ukutholwa Okuhlakaniphile Kwendawo
list.desc: Namathisela isixhumanisi se-YouTube? Siphakamisa ibhulogi + Twitter. Namathisela i-Bilibili? Siphakamisa i-WeChat + Xiaohongshu.

formats.outputSubtitle: Khiqiza konke ngesikhathi esisodwa — akukho sidingo sokusebenzisa ithuluzi izikhathi eziningi.
formats.langSubtitle: Kopisha futhi ukhiqize okuqukethwe ngezilimi ezingaphezu kwama-63. Kulungele abadali bamazwe ngamazwe nezethameli zomhlaba wonke.

testimonials.text: "Ekugcineni ithuluzi eliqonda umsebenzi wokudala okuqukethwe. Ividiyo eyodwa → zonke izinkundla ngemizuzu. Kushintsha umdlalo ohlelweni lwami lokuqukethwe."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Ukucwengwa okungaxoxwayo kuhle kakhulu. Ngingakwazi ukulungisa okukhipha ngakunye ngokuxoxa nje nakho. Kungisindisa amahora nsuku zonke."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Nganginokungabaza ngokuqukethwe kwe-AI, kodwa ikhwalithi yangimangaza ngempela. Ukufometha okukhethekile kwendawo kunembile."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "Njengomsunguli oyedwa, leli thuluzi linginikeza umkhiqizo weqembu lokuqukethwe. Okuthunyelwe kwe-LinkedIn, amabhulogi, ama-tweets — konke kusuka kuvidiyo eyodwa."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Izintengo
pricing.title: Izintengo
pricing.subtitle: Qala mahhala, thuthukisa lapho udinga okwengeziwe. Azikho izindleko ezifihliwe.

cta.title: Ukulungele
cta.subtitle: Joyina izinkulungwane zabadali abaphendula ividiyo ngayinye ibe isu eliphelele lokuqukethwe ezinkundleni eziningi. Qala mahhala — ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.

footer.tagline: Ukusetshenziswa kabusha kokuqukethwe okunamandla nge-AI. Phendula ividiyo eyodwa ibe isu lakho lonke lokuqukethwe ezinkundleni eziningi.
